200.html:
data [required]

object

The RUM SDK configuration data object.

attributes [required]

object

Attributes of the RUM SDK configuration.

rum [required]

object

The RUM SDK settings for a configuration.

allowed_tracing_urls

[object]

A list of URL configurations for distributed tracing.

match [required]

object

A match option used for URL or origin pattern matching.

rc_serialized_type [required]

enum

The type of match pattern, either a literal string or a regex. Allowed enum values: string,regex

value [required]

string

The value to match against.

propagator_types [required]

[string]

The list of trace propagator types to use for this URL.

allowed_tracking_origins

[object]

A list of origin patterns allowed for cross-origin session tracking.

rc_serialized_type [required]

enum

The type of match pattern, either a literal string or a regex. Allowed enum values: string,regex

value [required]

string

The value to match against.

application_id [required]

string

The ID of the RUM application this configuration belongs to.

context

[object]

A list of dynamic option key-value pairs.

key [required]

string

The key name for this dynamic configuration pair.

value [required]

object

A dynamic configuration option that extracts a value at runtime using a specified strategy.

attribute

string

The element attribute to read. Used when strategy is dom.

extractor

object

A serialized regex used as an extractor in dynamic options.

rc_serialized_type [required]

enum

The type identifier for a serialized regex. Always regex. Allowed enum values: regex

value [required]

string

The regex pattern used for extraction.

key

string

The localStorage key to read. Required when strategy is localStorage.

name

string

The cookie name to read. Required when strategy is cookie.

path

string

The JavaScript path used to extract the value. Required when strategy is js.

rc_serialized_type [required]

enum

The type identifier for a dynamic option. Always dynamic. Allowed enum values: dynamic

selector

string

The CSS selector to read from the page. Required when strategy is dom.

strategy [required]

enum

The strategy used to extract the dynamic value. Allowed enum values: js,cookie,dom,localStorage

default_privacy_level [required]

string

The default privacy masking level applied to all RUM data.

enable_privacy_for_action_name [required]

boolean

Whether to mask user-interaction action names for privacy.

env

string

The environment tag for the RUM application.

service

string

The service name tag for the RUM application.

session_replay_sample_rate [required]

int64

The percentage of collected sessions for which a replay is captured (0–100).

session_sample_rate [required]

int64

The percentage of user sessions to collect (0–100).

trace_sample_rate

int64

The percentage of requests to forward as APM traces (0–100).

track_session_across_subdomains

boolean

Whether to share a session across subdomains of the same site.

user

[object]

A list of dynamic option key-value pairs.

key [required]

string

The key name for this dynamic configuration pair.

value [required]

object

A dynamic configuration option that extracts a value at runtime using a specified strategy.

attribute

string

The element attribute to read. Used when strategy is dom.

extractor

object

A serialized regex used as an extractor in dynamic options.

rc_serialized_type [required]

enum

The type identifier for a serialized regex. Always regex. Allowed enum values: regex

value [required]

string

The regex pattern used for extraction.

key

string

The localStorage key to read. Required when strategy is localStorage.

name

string

The cookie name to read. Required when strategy is cookie.

path

string

The JavaScript path used to extract the value. Required when strategy is js.

rc_serialized_type [required]

enum

The type identifier for a dynamic option. Always dynamic. Allowed enum values: dynamic

selector

string

The CSS selector to read from the page. Required when strategy is dom.

strategy [required]

enum

The strategy used to extract the dynamic value. Allowed enum values: js,cookie,dom,localStorage

version

object

A dynamic configuration option that extracts a value at runtime using a specified strategy.

attribute

string

The element attribute to read. Used when strategy is dom.

extractor

object

A serialized regex used as an extractor in dynamic options.

rc_serialized_type [required]

enum

The type identifier for a serialized regex. Always regex. Allowed enum values: regex

value [required]

string

The regex pattern used for extraction.

key

string

The localStorage key to read. Required when strategy is localStorage.

name

string

The cookie name to read. Required when strategy is cookie.

path

string

The JavaScript path used to extract the value. Required when strategy is js.

rc_serialized_type [required]

enum

The type identifier for a dynamic option. Always dynamic. Allowed enum values: dynamic

selector

string

The CSS selector to read from the page. Required when strategy is dom.

strategy [required]

enum

The strategy used to extract the dynamic value. Allowed enum values: js,cookie,dom,localStorage

id [required]

string

The unique identifier of the RUM SDK configuration.

meta

object

Metadata associated with a RUM SDK configuration.

updated_at [required]

date-time

The timestamp of the last update to this configuration.

updated_by [required]

string

The handle of the user who last updated this configuration.

type [required]

enum

The type of the resource. The value should always be rum_sdk_config. Allowed enum values: rum_sdk_config

default: rum_sdk_config

403.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

404.html:
errors [required]

[object]

A list of errors.

detail

string

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

meta

object

Non-standard meta-information about the error

source

object

References to the source of the error.

header

string

A string indicating the name of a single request header which caused the error.

parameter

string

A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

pointer

string

A JSON pointer to the value in the request document that caused the error.

status

string

Status code of the response.

title

string

Short human-readable summary of the error.

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

400.html:
errors [required]

[object]

A list of errors.

detail

string

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

meta

object

Non-standard meta-information about the error

source

object

References to the source of the error.

header

string

A string indicating the name of a single request header which caused the error.

parameter

string

A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

pointer

string

A JSON pointer to the value in the request document that caused the error.

status

string

Status code of the response.

title

string

Short human-readable summary of the error.
